chase sapphire preferred.redemption_val: 1.25 cents per point via Chase Travel Portal
chase sapphire preferred.strategy: Transfer to Hyatt for high-end stays; use Portal for cheap domestic flights.

amex platinum.redemption_val: Best value via airline transfers; poor portal value.
amex platinum.strategy: Book 'Fine Hotels + Resorts' to use the $200 credit.

chase marriott bonvoy boundless.special_2026_offer: $100 Airline Statement Credit available through Dec 2026.
chase marriott bonvoy boundless.strategy: Spend $250 on airfare before June 30 to trigger the first $50 credit.

citi aadvantage platinum select.strategy: Use for domestic AA flights to save on baggage fees.

chase ihg premier.strategy: Always book in 4-night increments to maximize the discount.
